hero.subtitle: Email is the only channel you fully own. We design, write, and automate sequences that turn your list into a consistent, compounding revenue engine.

details.title: What We Do & Why It Matters
details.card1Desc: Low open rates, high unsubscribes, and email that feels like spam. Most email lists are either underused or being burned out — leaving significant revenue sitting on the table.
details.card2Desc: Strategy, design, copywriting, and automation — turning your subscriber list into a channel that nurtures relationships and generates revenue month after month.
details.card3Desc: Higher open and click rates, automated sequences that sell while you sleep, and a list that grows in value over time instead of decaying.

subFeatures.title: Every Deliverable,
subFeatures.item1Desc: On-brand email templates designed for readability, engagement, and conversion — built to stand out in a crowded inbox.
subFeatures.item2Desc: Subject lines, preview text, and body copy written to get opened, read, and acted on — tailored to your audience and offer.
subFeatures.item3Desc: Welcome flows, abandoned cart sequences, post-purchase nurturing, and win-back campaigns that run on autopilot.
subFeatures.item4Desc: Divide your list by behaviour, purchase history, and engagement to send the right message to the right person at the right time.
subFeatures.item5Desc: Systematic testing of subject lines, CTAs, send times, and layouts to continuously improve every metric.
subFeatures.item6Desc: Monthly reports covering open rate, CTR, revenue per email, list growth, and unsubscribe trends with clear optimisation actions.

caseStudy.title: Real Results for Real Businesses
caseStudy.case1Problem: A list of 18,000 subscribers generating almost no revenue. Campaigns were sent irregularly, had an 11% open rate, and no automation sequences were in place.
caseStudy.case2Problem: No automation in place. The brand was sending one broadcast a month with a generic template — missing every post-purchase and abandoned cart opportunity.
